title: matelea rivularis
intro: Matelea rivularis, also known as the "Coral Milkflower," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of iridoid glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Matelea rivularis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
